pertanyaan:
Read the text to answer question.

**Text 1**

About 10 of 8 adults really like the habit of drinking coffee. Coffee is a drink that is derived from the seeds of the fruit of the coffee that's been crushed. There are many types of coffee, ranging from coffee robusta coffee, badgers etc. In addition to the useful as relievers drowsiness and body warmers, coffee drinks also have other benefits for skin health and beauty.

Wajahjerawat.com reveals that in substance content in the form of coffee of carbohydrates, glycosides, minerals, amino acids, protein, caffeine, aliphatic carboxylic acid/acid, trigoneline acid, klorogenat and many more. In addition to nourish the body, all of the content also has the ability to nourish the skin because the coffee also has benefits for the skin, especially on the part of the face.

The benefits of coffee for the face also already proven, because there are some places face care spa and salon which has been coffee to use face masks. As quoted from manfaat.com, as for the benefits offered by coffee for the facial skin is as follows: Resolve Acne Problem, Eliminate Blackheads, etc.

What can be inferred from the text above?
pilihan: There are disadvantages of coffee if we drink it in the morning.
There are compounds in the coffee is face beneficial.
The coffee is useful as relievers drowsiness and body warmers.
The coffee has the ability to remove dead skin cells.
One of the benefits of coffee is to make our body healthy.
pembahasan: Berdasarkan teks, kopi mengandung berbagai zat (karbohidrat, mineral, kafein, dll) yang memberikan manfaat bagi kulit wajah. Pilihan B paling tepat menyimpulkan bahwa senyawa dalam kopi bermanfaat untuk wajah (face beneficial).

pertanyaan: What is the topic of the text? (Based on Text 1 about coffee benefits)
pilihan: The benefits of coffee for the facial skin.
How to make a coffee mask.
The useful as relievers drowsiness and body warmers.
How to make pimples to dry more quickly.
Coffee used as a facial mask and a natural facial scrub.
pembahasan: Seluruh teks menjelaskan berbagai manfaat kopi secara spesifik untuk perawatan kulit wajah (facial skin), seperti menutrisi kulit dan mengatasi masalah jerawat.

pertanyaan: From the sentence, "If used as a face mask on a regular basis, coffee can shrink the pores of the face so that it can make the skin free from acne and blackhead problem." the writer tries to imply that ...
pilihan: When used as a face mask on a regular basis can control the content of excess oil on the face.
The coffee has the ability to remove dead skin cells.
There are some places face care spa and salon which has been coffee to use face masks.
If we use coffee mask regularly, it will shrink skin our pores face.
Oily face serve as a suitable place for blackheads.
pembahasan: Kalimat tersebut secara eksplisit menyatakan bahwa penggunaan masker kopi secara rutin berimplikasi pada mengecilnya pori-pori wajah (shrink the pores).

pertanyaan:
Wajahjerawat.com **reveals** that in substance content in the form of coffee of carbohydrates...

What is the opposite of the underlined word (reveals)?
pilihan: Tattle
Expose
Bring out
Excavate
Hide
pembahasan: 'Reveals' berarti mengungkapkan atau memperlihatkan. Lawan katanya adalah 'Hide' yang berarti menyembunyikan.

pertanyaan: Which of the following statements is true according to the passage? (Based on Text 1)
pilihan: Coffee used as a body wash and a natural body scrub on a regular basis can make the skin become more moist and smooth.
Blackhead occurs because the face had deposits of excess oil, normal face serve as a suitable place for blackheads.
In the coffee there is content of antioxidants which serves to lift the dead skin cells that accumulate due to free radicals.
In addition to nourish the body, all of the content also has the ability to damage the skin.
Coffee dregs can be used as a facial scrub to address acne problems with how to make pimples to dry more slowly.
pembahasan: Teks menyebutkan bahwa kopi memiliki antioksidan yang berfungsi mengangkat sel kulit mati (lift the dead skin cells) yang menumpuk karena radikal bebas.

pertanyaan:
Read the text to answer question.

**Text 2**

An orchestra is a group of musicians who play together on various instruments. They have many instruments and play mostly classical music which is performed in concerts. A large orchestra is sometimes called a symphony orchestra and a small orchestra is called a chamber orchestra. A symphony orchestra can have about 100 players, while a chamber orchestra may have 30 or 40. The number of musicians depends on the music they play and the size of the place where they play.

What does the author purpose in the first paragraph?
pilihan: To tell us about the definition of the Orchestra.
To educate us about the history of the Orchestra.
To give information about how to be an orchestra
To explain us about the way to play the instruments.
To inform the readers how to be a conductor.
pembahasan: Paragraf pertama memberikan penjelasan dasar mengenai apa itu orkestra, jenis-jenisnya, dan jumlah pemainnya, yang merupakan sebuah definisi.

pertanyaan: The following statements are true according to the passage (Text 2), except ...
pilihan: An orchestra can have between two and four of each of these instruments.
Some symphony orchestras have only professional musicians.
A modern orchestra consists of thirteen sections or families of instruments.
The word orchestra was first used by the ancient Greeks and meant the front part of a stage.
Orchestral music is written in the form of a score, which shows the notes that are played by each instrument.
pembahasan: Dalam teks disebutkan bahwa orkestra modern terdiri dari empat bagian (four sections/families), bukan tiga belas. Maka pernyataan C adalah yang salah (except).

pertanyaan: When were the orchestras organized by the king and queen of France?
pilihan: the late 2th and early 3th centuries.
the late 4th and early 5th centuries.
the late 8th and early 9th centuries.
the late 1th and early 3th centuries.
the late 6th and early 7th centuries.
pembahasan: Berdasarkan bagian sejarah di dalam teks, orkestra pertama diorganisir oleh raja dan ratu Prancis pada akhir abad ke-6 dan awal abad ke-7.

pertanyaan: What is the topic of the text? (Text 2)
pilihan: Sections of an Orchestra
The Orchestra
The Conductor

London Symphony
pembahasan: Teks tersebut membahas segala hal tentang orkestra, mulai dari definisi, struktur, pemimpin (konduktor), hingga sejarahnya. Jadi topik utamanya adalah 'The Orchestra'.

pertanyaan: How length and weigh do adult pandas usually weigh?
pilihan: Grown-up pandas have a length between 160 to 180 cm and the heaviness of a grown-up panda is more often than not between 80 to 125 kg.

Grown-up pandas have a length between 160 to 200 cm and the heaviness of a grown-up panda is more often than not between 80 to 126 kg.
Grown-up pandas have a length between 137 to 180 cm and the heaviness of a grown-up panda is more often than not between 80 to 195 kg.
